headline: EPAM Leads as a Top IT Service Provider in Belgium and Luxembourg
summary: As organizations adapt and scale to meet rapidly evolving market demands, partnering with an IT provider that brings strong engineering expertise and integrated technical capabilities is critical for accelerating transformation and ensuring AI readiness. EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) today announced it has been recognized as a 2026 Top IT Sourcing Vendor in Belgium and Luxembourg by Whitelane Research, an independent organization focused on IT sourcing research across Europe.

content.title: EPAM Leads as a Top IT Service Provider in Belgium and Luxembourg
content.summary: As organizations adapt and scale to meet rapidly evolving market demands, partnering with an IT provider that brings strong engineering expertise and integrated technical capabilities is critical for accelerating transformation and ensuring AI readiness. EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) today announced it has been recognized as a 2026 Top IT Sourcing Vendor in Belgium and Luxembourg by Whitelane Research, an independent organization focused on IT sourcing research across Europe.

thumbnail.caption: Top client ratings in application services and general satisfaction underscore EPAM’s end-to-end digital and AI transformation capabilities in Whitelane Research’s 2026 BeLux IT Sourcing Study.
